languages.text: "Разумеется, Вольный Торговец. Я уверен, что мой дражайший коллега будет польщен вниманием".
"Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."
languages.original_text: "Разумеется, Вольный Торговец. Я уверен, что мой дражайший коллега будет польщен вниманием".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."
"Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."
"Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

languages.text: «Desde luego, Comerciante Independiente. Estoy seguro de que mi querido colega se sentirá honrado por su interés».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: «Desde luego, Comerciante Independiente. Estoy seguro de que mi querido colega se sentirá honrado por su interés».

languages.text: “当然可以，行商浪人。我相信，我最亲爱的同僚定会因您的关注而倍感荣幸。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: “当然可以，行商浪人。我相信，我最亲爱的同僚定会因您的关注而倍感荣幸。”

languages.text: « Bien entendu, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je suis certain que mon cher collègue serait honoré d'avoir votre attention. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: « Bien entendu, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je suis certain que mon cher collègue serait honoré d'avoir votre attention. »

languages.text: "Elbette Hür Tacir. Eminim pek değerli meslektaşım, ilginizden onur duyacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Hür Tacir. Eminim pek değerli meslektaşım, ilginizden onur duyacaktır."

languages.text: 「もちろんです、ローグトレーダー。我が親愛なる同僚も、あなたの関心を光栄に思うことでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろんです、ローグトレーダー。我が親愛なる同僚も、あなたの関心を光栄に思うことでしょう」

languages.text: "Natürlich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich bin sicher, mein geschätzter Kollege fühlt sich durch Eure Aufmerksamkeit geehrt."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Rogue Trader. I'm sure my dearest colleague will be honoured by your attention."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich bin sicher, mein geschätzter Kollege fühlt sich durch Eure Aufmerksamkeit geehrt."
